title: Mythic Mobs
description: Small chance for mobs to spawn as a 'Mythic' and have stronger traits
body:
This datapack lets 'Mythic' version of mobs spawn in your world. Every mob within a 100x 20y (check gallery for image) block radius of the player will have a 1 in 200 chance of being a Mythic. When a mob is made mythic it is given: - Bossbar visible to all players within 100 blocks - `1.1x` Scale - `2x` Health - `2x` Follow Range - `+0.4` Speed - Fire Resistance - Cool potion effect colors to let you know it is mythic - Increased drop XP When a mythic mob dies it will automatically clear the bossbar and summon a lightning bolt in its place.
NOTICE If for some reason you want to run /kill @e with this datapack enabled, make sure you exclude markers from it. e.g. (/kill @e[type=!marker]) Otherwise you might get the bossbar stuck on your screen.
